title:
5. COMMENT & COMPARE (Optional Editorial Layer)


<
content:
5. COMMENT & COMPARE (Optional Editorial Layer)


• Add side-by-side:

• V1 > V2 comparisons

• Meta notes on

what changed

and

why


• Timeline of decisions

• Output: Annotated Version Trail (AVT)


Why it matters

: Good for teaching, collaboration, and future reuse/audit of threads.


⸻


6. EXPORT & INDEX


• Final outputs should include:

• .md with all deduped, fused content

• .txt or .csv of unit IDs + notes

• Companion index: Unit ID → Summary → Use


⸻


[PRC02] — HOW TO USE THIS SYSTEM


•

For archival

: Use this to process entire ChatGPT threads, Apple Notes dumps, Dropbox file logs.
